name: Forgejo source (example)
author: Symphony
description: Issue-source plugin for Forgejo (Gitea-compatible): pulls open issues across the configured repos as Symphony tasks (pull requests excluded), and pushes terminal task status back by adding a comment and closing the issue. Reads its token + siteUrl + repos from <install-dir>/config.json. Repackages the in-tree Forgejo connector via the @symphony/plugin-sdk provides.issueSource contract — fetch_open_issues + write_back_status, wrapped host-side into the same ingest + writeback pipeline (sync_forgejo).
